ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population per square mile */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the county population */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnicities in the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the county data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the dataset */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the variable (e.g., Observed Change, Sensitivity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable (e.g., integer, float) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum possible value of the variable */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum possible value of the variable */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the variable data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the variable data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data value belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data value belongs to */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the data value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual data value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data value */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data value was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data value */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the data value was last updated */,
  "quality_check_status" TEXT /* Status of the data quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the model */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model making the prediction */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the prediction belongs to */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable being predicted */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the prediction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the prediction */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was last updated */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "model_accuracy_at_time" REAL /* Accuracy score of the model at the time of prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES analytical_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, upload dataset) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets_counties" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets_variables" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models_variables" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_demographics" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the county */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of age groups */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Distribution of education levels */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the county */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)
